_notice: Verifiers should pin a copy of this file alongside the bundle so verification works offline. After key rotation, retired keys remain in this list (status: retired) so historical bundles stay verifiable.

keys.publicKeyPem:
-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
<populate via scripts/proof/publish-public-key.ts after KMS key is provisioned>
-----END PUBLIC KEY-----
keys.notes: First production proof-bundle signing key. Rotation policy: every 12 months OR on suspected compromise.

process: Operator: provision new GCP KMS Ed25519 key version under same keyring (`proof-signing/proof-ed25519`).
Operator: run `npx tsx services/worker/scripts/proof/publish-public-key.ts <new_key_resource> <new_signing_key_id>` to append the new key to docs/public-keys.json.
Worker: redeploy with PROOF_SIGNING_KMS_KEY pointing at the new key version + PROOF_SIGNING_KEY_ID set to the new id.
Operator: mark previous key `status: retired` in docs/public-keys.json + set `retired_at_utc`. Do NOT remove the entry — historical bundles must remain verifiable.
compromise_response: Mark compromised key `status: compromised` in docs/public-keys.json with `retired_at_utc`.
Disable the KMS key version in GCP Console (prevents further signing).
Rotate per process above and announce on docs.arkova.ai with the affected window so verifiers can require a co-signed re-issue.
